structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Enable Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable the plant in the lowest stage when it has been disabled for at least 15 minutes, and all of the following are true: number of Chiller Plant Requests exceeds I (default 0, adjustable), OAT > CH-LOT, and the chiller plant enable schedule is active.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant has been disabled for at least 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable plant in lowest stage if number of Chiller Plant Requests > I, OAT > CH-LOT, and schedule active.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Enable the plant in the lowest stage when the plant has been disabled for at least 15 minutes and: a. Number of Chiller Plant Requests > I (I = Ignores shall default to 0, adjustable), and b. OAT>CH-LOT, and c. The chiller plant enable schedule is active.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Disable Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable the plant when it has been enabled for at least 15 minutes and any of the following: number of Chiller Plant Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes, OAT < CH-LOT – 1°F, or chiller plant enable schedule inactive.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant has been enabled for at least 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable plant if any of the three conditions are met.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Disable the plant when it has been enabled for at least 15 minutes and: a. Number of Chiller Plant Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes, or b. OAT<CH-LOT – 1°F, or c. The chiller plant enable schedule is inactive.

evidence_quote: Disable the plant when it has been enabled for at least 15 minutes and: a. Number of Chiller Plant Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes, or b. OAT<CH-LOT – 1°F, or c. The chiller plant enable schedule is inactive.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Enabling Schedule Default
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The chiller plant shall include an enabling schedule; default schedule is 24/7, adjustable.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The chiller plant shall include an enabling schedule that allows operators to lock out the plant during off-hours, holidays, or any other scheduled event, e.g., to allow off-hour operation of HVAC systems except the chiller plant. The default schedule shall be 24/7 (adjustable).

evidence_quote: The chiller plant shall include an enabling schedule that allows operators to lock out the plant during off-hours, holidays, or any other scheduled event, e.g., to allow off-hour operation of HVAC systems except the chiller plant. The default schedule shall be 24/7 (adjustable).
evidence_text: The chiller plant shall include an enabling schedule that allows operators to lock out the plant during off-hours, holidays, or any other scheduled event, e.g., to allow off-hour operation of HVAC systems except the chiller plant. The default schedule shall be 24/7 (adjustable).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Waterside Economizer Enable Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable WSE if disabled for at least 20 minutes and CHWRT upstream of HX > predicted heat exchanger leaving water temperature (PHXLWT) plus 2°F.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: WSE has been disabled for at least 20 minutes and CHWRT upstream of HX > PHXLWT + 2°F.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable WSE.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Enable waterside economizer (WSE) if it has been disabled for at least 20 minutes and CHWRT upstream of HX is greater than the predicted heat exchanger leaving water temperature (PHXLWT) plus 2°F.

evidence_quote: Enable waterside economizer (WSE) if it has been disabled for at least 20 minutes and CHWRT upstream of HX is greater than the predicted heat exchanger leaving water temperature (PHXLWT) plus 2°F.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Waterside Economizer Disable Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable WSE when it has run for at least 20 minutes and CHW temp downstream of HX > CHWRT upstream of HX minus 1°F for 2 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: WSE has run for at least 20 minutes and CHW temp downstream > CHWRT upstream - 1°F for 2 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable WSE.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Disable WSE when it has run for at least 20 minutes and CHW temp downstream of HX is greater than CHWRT upstream of HX less 1ºF for 2 minutes (i.e., if the HX is not reducing the CHW temp by at least 1°F).

evidence_quote: Disable WSE when it has run for at least 20 minutes and CHW temp downstream of HX is greater than CHWRT upstream of HX less 1ºF for 2 minutes (i.e., if the HX is not reducing the CHW temp by at least 1°F).
evidence_text: Disable WSE when it has run for at least 20 minutes and CHW temp downstream of HX is greater than CHWRT upstream of HX less 1ºF for 2 minutes (i.e., if the HX is not reducing the CHW temp by at least 1°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: WSE In-line CHW Return Valve Modulation
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Waterside economizer in-line CHW return line valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When enabled, modulate valve by direct-acting PID to maintain DP across CHW side of HX at HX DP-Design, mapping 0% output to 0% open, 100% output to 100% open, with launch bias at 100% open. Valve fully open when loop disabled.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: WSE in-line CHW return line valve enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate valve via direct-acting PID to maintain HX DP at HX DP-Design.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the WSE in-line CHW return line valve is enabled, it shall be modulated by a direct-acting PID loop to maintain the DP across the CHW side of the HX at HX DP-Design. Map the loop output from 0% open at 0% output to 100% open at 100% output. Bias the loop to launch from 100% output. The valve shall be fully open when loop is disabled.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Economizer-Only CHW Bypass Valve Operation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Open bypass valve when economizer enabled and all chiller isolation valves commanded closed. Close when any chiller isolation valve commanded open and exceeds 25% open.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Economizer enabled and all chiller isolation valves commanded closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Open the economizer-only CHW bypass valve. Close it when any chiller isolation valve is commanded open and exceeds 25% open.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When economizer is enabled and all chiller isolation valves are commanded closed, open the economizer-only CHW bypass valve. Close bypass valve when any chiller isolation valve is commanded open and exceeds 25% open (as determined by valve position (if provided), or either nominal valve timing or valve ramp rate, whichever is slower).

evidence_quote: When economizer is enabled and all chiller isolation valves are commanded closed, open the economizer-only CHW bypass valve. Close bypass valve when any chiller isolation valve is commanded open and exceeds 25% open (as determined by valve position (if provided), or either nominal valve timing or valve ramp rate, whichever is slower).

Close bypass valve when any chiller isolation valve is commanded open and exceeds 25% open (as determined by valve position (if provided), or either nominal valve timing or valve ramp rate, whichever is slower).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary CHW Pump Speed Control to DP
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When any pump proven on, control pump speed by reverse-acting PID to maintain differential pressure at setpoint CHW-DPsp; all pumps same speed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any pump proven on.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reverse-acting PID loop maintains DP; same speed to all pumps.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When any pump is proven on, pump speed will be controlled by a reverse acting PID loop maintaining the differential pressure signal at a setpoint CHW-DPsp determined by the reset scheme described herein. All pumps receive the same speed signal.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Setpoint Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Chilled Water Minimum Flow Bypass Valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Bypass valve modulates to maintain minimum flow setpoint = highest MinFlowRatio (CHW-MinFlowX/CHW-DesFlowX) multiplied by sum of CHW-DesFlowX of operating chillers.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Chillers operating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate bypass valve to computed minimum flow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Bypass valve shall modulate to maintain minimum flow as measured by the chilled water flow meter at a setpoint that provides minimum flow through all operating chillers, determined as follows: a. For the chillers operating in the stage, identify the chiller with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio, of CHW-MinFlowX to CHW-DesFlowX. b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the sum of CHW-DesFlowX for the operating chillers.

evidence_quote: Bypass valve shall modulate to maintain minimum flow as measured by the chilled water flow meter at a setpoint that provides minimum flow through all operating chillers, determined as follows: a. For the chillers operating in the stage, identify the chiller with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio, of CHW-MinFlowX to CHW-DesFlowX. b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the sum of CHW-DesFlowX for the operating chillers.
evidence_text: Bypass valve shall modulate to maintain minimum flow as measured by the chilled water flow meter at a setpoint that provides minimum flow through all operating chillers, determined as follows: a. For the chillers operating in the stage, identify the chiller with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio, of CHW-MinFlowX to CHW-DesFlowX. b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the sum of CHW-DesFlowX for the operating chillers.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Tower Make-up Water Valve Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Make-up water valve shall open when water level falls below T-level-min-fill; close when above T-level-max-fill.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Water level below T-level-min-fill (open), above T-level-max-fill (close).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Open/close make-up water valve based on level sensor.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Make-up water valve shall cycle based on tower water fill level sensor. The valve shall open when water level falls below T-level-min-fill. It shall close when the water level goes above T-level-max-fill.

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD: Chilled Water Supply Temperature Too High
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when CHWST AVG - ƐCHWT ≥ CHWSTSP, applied in OS #2-#5.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CHWST AVG - ƐCHWT ≥ CHWSTSP
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault: 'Chilled water supply temperature is too high'.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#6 Equation CHWST AVG - ƐCHWT ≥ CHWSTSP Applies to OS #2 – #5 Description Chilled water supply temperature is too high Possible Diagnosis Mechanical problem with chillers Primary flow is higher than the design evaporator flow of the operating chillers

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD: Differential Pressure Too High with Pumps Off
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when DP AVG > ƐDP and status CHWP = Off, in OS #1.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: DP AVG > ƐDP and Status CHWP = Off
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault: 'Differential pressure is too high with the chilled water pumps off'.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DP AVG > ƐDP and Status CHWP = Off
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#1 Equation DP AVG > Ɛ DSP and Status CHWP = Off Applies to OS #1 Description Differential pressure is too high with the chilled water pumps off Possible Diagnosis DP sensor error

structured_payload_candidate.title: Alarm: Pump Maintenance Interval
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm when pump operated for more than 3000 hours per Staging Runtime.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Staging Runtime > 3000 hours.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Issue Level 4 maintenance alarm; reset counter on acknowledgement.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Pump has operated for more than 3000 hours as indicated by the Staging Runtime
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Maintenance interval alarm when pump has operated for more than 3000 hours as indicated by the Staging Runtime: Level 4. Reset the Staging Runtime interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.

evidence_quote: Maintenance interval alarm when pump has operated for more than 3000 hours as indicated by the Staging Runtime: Level 4. Reset the Staging Runtime interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.
